title: Home Row Stability
summary: Turn early comfort into reliable home-row control that holds up over several lines.
skillTheme: repeatable home-row accuracy under light pressure

lessons.label: Benchwork
lessons.goal: Return to the resting keys after every letter.
lessons.text: asdf jkl; keeps the workshop ready

lessons.label: Quiet Nails
lessons.goal: Trim down the urge to correct mid-line.
lessons.text: steady hands leave fewer marks behind

lessons.label: Square Sweep
lessons.goal: Carry the same pace from start to finish.
lessons.text: the home square grows brighter with every clean pass

capstone.label: Square Muster
capstone.goal: Hold your form through a full home-row sentence.
capstone.text: steady home row work gives the square a warm dependable glow

unlocks.description: A new route opens beyond the square toward the workshop paths.
